title: beval Conversation Run Result
description: Schema for beval conversation simulation run results per spec/conversation-sim.spec.md §15.10.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run completed.

mode.description: Evaluation mode used for this run.

config.description: Non-sensitive configuration values used for this run.

summary.description: Aggregate summary of all conversation results.

EvaluationMode.description: Evaluation mode controlling which grader layers are active.

Score.description: A normalized score in the range 0.0 to 1.0.

GraderLayer.description: The grader layer that produced this grade.

RunConfig.description: Non-sensitive configuration snapshot for the run.

grade_pass_threshold.description: Threshold above which a grade passes.

case_pass_threshold.description: Threshold at or above which a conversation passes.

metric_weights.description: Per-metric weights for weighted score aggregation.

active_layers.description: Explicitly active grader layers; null to use mode defaults.

agent.description: Agent identity when an agent adapter was used.

AgentInfo.description: Non-sensitive agent identity included in results.

ConversationRunSummary.description: Aggregate summary across all conversations in the run.

errored.description: Number of conversations that errored during execution.

cancelled.description: Number of conversations that were cancelled.

total.description: Total number of conversations in the run.

total_turns.description: Sum of turn counts across all conversations.

mean_turns_to_goal.description: Mean turn count across goal-achieved conversations; null if no goal achieved.

metrics.description: Per-metric average scores across all conversations.

criterion.description: The criterion string that triggered this grader.

metric.description: Metric category for this grade (e.g., latency, quality).

passed.description: Whether the score exceeded the grade pass threshold.

detail.description: Human-readable detail about the grading result.

layer.description: Which grader layer produced this grade.

skipped.description: Whether the grader was skipped due to evaluation mode.

stage.description: One-based turn number for per-turn grades; null for conversation-level grades.

stage_name.description: Turn label (e.g., 'turn 3') for per-turn grades; null for conversation-level grades.

TurnResult.description: Recorded outcome of one conversation turn.

turn_number.description: One-based turn index within the conversation.

user_message.description: The message generated by the simulator and sent to the agent.

agent_response.description: The agent's text response for this turn.

completion_time_seconds.description: Adapter response time for this turn in seconds.

goal_progress.description: DynamicCase.progress value for this turn (0.0–1.0 fraction of goal achieved).

grades.description: Per-turn grade results from goal.graders.per_turn criterion strings.

metric_scores.description: Per-metric average scores for this turn.

overall_score.description: Mean of non-skipped per-turn grades for this turn.

error.description: Error message if this turn errored; null otherwise.

ConversationResult.description: Aggregated evaluation result for a single conversation (one actor running one persona/goal pair).

category.description: Grouping key derived as '{persona_id}/{goal_id}'. Matches CaseResult.category shape for result tooling reuse.

persona_id.description: ID of the persona used in this conversation.

goal_id.description: ID of the goal pursued in this conversation.

actor_index.description: One-based actor index within the actor_count for this persona/goal pair.

overall_score.description: Mean of all non-skipped per-turn and conversation-level grades.

goal_achievement_score.description: 1.0 if termination_reason=goal_achieved; otherwise the last DynamicCase.progress value.

goal_achieved.description: True if the conversation terminated with reason=goal_achieved.

turn_count.description: Number of turns completed in this conversation.

time_seconds.description: Total wall-clock execution time in seconds.

metric_scores.description: Per-metric average scores across all turns and conversation-level grades.

error.description: Error message if the conversation errored; null otherwise.

grades.description: Conversation-level grade results from goal.graders.conversation criterion strings.
